title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality · Runtime Trace: Primitive Types
summary: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js primitive types increment in a value-normalization and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish undefined, null, Boolean, Number, BigInt, String, Symbol, and object values by behavior and use.
Record runtime, module mode, inputs, locale, time, and dependency conditions needed to reproduce behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
